ops.insert: Strategy & Implementation Plan — Absolute Defence as Layer 3 (ADOS Edition)

TrackTik and competitors own Workforce Management. Nobody owns Public & Personnel Protection. Every visitor, staff member, contractor and member of the public on a guarded site is currently uncovered. Martyn's Law makes this a regulatory crisis.
Absolute Defence is the Public & Personnel Protection Operating System — Layer 3. We sit ON TOP of TrackTik, not against it. We complete the stack.

ADOS — the Autonomous Defence Operating System. Nine specialised AI agents in a Supervisor-Handoff Hybrid architecture. TrackTik's entire AI surface is one report-writing assistant. We are 18-24 months ahead in a category they have not recognised.

Four movements over 12 months. REFRAME (positioning, 0-30 days). REINFORCE (product visibility of ADOS, 30-90 days). RELEASE (six new features, 90-180 days). REVENUE (white-label partner channel, 180-365 days).
Dardan partnership through Andy. Partner-positioning meeting on 17 April. Goal: signed white-label pilot at one Dardan-protected site within 90 days.
Who We Are (One sentence — never deviate)

"Absolute Defence is the Public & Personnel Protection Operating System. We protect everybody on the premises — the guards who guard the people, and the people the guards are guarding. Powered by ADOS, our nine-agent autonomous defence architecture."
The Three-Layer Stack (Reference in every conversation)
Layer 1 — Guard Accountability (QR-Patrol et al.) — Did the guard patrol?
Layer 2 — Workforce Management (TrackTik et al.) — Is the security business efficient?
Layer 3 — Human Protection (Absolute Defence) — Is everybody on site protected? OUR CATEGORY.
Never compete head-to-head with TrackTik on workforce management. We will lose.
Never build guard scheduling, payroll, billing, invoicing. Not our category.
Never lead with technology. Lead with WHO we protect (everybody) and HOW we prove it (ADOS).
Never use 'AI' alone. Always 'agentic' or 'autonomous specialists.' Distance from generic AI noise.
Treat as proper noun, like iOS, Stripe Sigma, Linux, AWS. Always 'Powered by ADOS.' Trademark search to be initiated within 30 days.
SENTINEL — Orchestrator. Routes incidents, manages handoffs, escalates to humans when judgement is required.
ARIA — Threat Intelligence. Sentiment analysis on voice. Risk scoring. Pattern recognition. Predictive heatmapping.
GUARDIAN — Triage & Response. Severity classification. Real-time guidance to person at risk. Acknowledgement chain SLA management.
WITNESS — Evidence & Documentation. Constructs Case Vault entries in real-time. Courtroom-ready packs. GDPR-ready.
COMPASS — Compliance. Martyn's Law / RIDDOR / ISO 45001 / KCSIE. Auto-classifies, alerts before breach.
ORACLE — Predictive Analytics. Recency-weighted heatmaps. Seasonal/temporal pattern detection. Proactive risk advisories.
BRIDGE — Stakeholder Communication. Multi-channel alerts. Client reports. Victim follow-up. Multilingual.
FORGE — Training & Readiness. Identifies capability gaps from incident patterns. Generates training recommendations.
SHIELD — Insurance & Risk Transfer. On-demand insurance evidence packs. Premium reduction documentation. Insurer integration.
Why this is a structural moat:

TrackTik's AI is one model (ReportPro) bolted onto an existing flow. ADOS is an architecture — a Supervisor-Handoff Hybrid with shared memory bus and inter-agent communication protocols. To match us, TrackTik would need to rebuild their core platform. They will not, because their buyer (security company COO) does not yet demand it. By the time they do, we will own the category vocabulary.
Angle 1 — EVERYBODY INSIDE (Public-facing, ad creative, LinkedIn)
Headline: "Your guards protect the building. We protect everybody inside it."
Visual: Wide lobby shot. Camera pulls back to reveal hundreds of people. Guards visible — protecting maybe 5%. Then green dots appear on every person on the premises.
Use for: Paid LinkedIn, billboard at IFSEC, ad in Security Journal, landing page hero.
Angle 2 — AGENTS IN THE ROOM (Enterprise buyer, partner channel)
Headline: "TrackTik gave you a report writer. We gave you nine specialists."
Visual: Empty boardroom. Nine glowing seats fill — agent names appear. SENTINEL at the head.
Use for: COO meetings, Dardan-style partnerships, IFSEC stage talk, investor pitch.
Angle 3 — BUILT FOR WHAT COMES NEXT (Public sector, councils, education, healthcare)
Headline: "Martyn's Law isn't coming. It's here. £18 million fines. Are you ready?"
Visual: Countdown clock. Manchester Arena memorial (respectfully shot). COMPASS UI activates: 'Site classified. Risk plan generated. Evidence chain active. Compliant.'
Use for: Council procurement teams, NHS Trust security leads, university estates, BSIA conference, Government Digital Marketplace listing.
🧬 SIX NEW FEATURES (Impossible For TrackTik To Ship)
Each feature widens the moat. Each one requires a category TrackTik has not built for. Prioritised by build-effort vs commercial impact.
Feature 1 — The Public QR Layer (Already in product. Marketise it.)
Every site gets poster QR codes in lobbies, lifts, toilets, car parks. Anyone scans to access Report / SOS / Guidance. No app.
Why TrackTik can't: Their entire buyer is the security firm. Building a public-facing protection product breaks their business model.
Sales weapon: Andy can show a Cambridge-style client a Cambridge-branded QR poster in 48 hours. Tangible. Visceral.
Feature 2 — The Voice Journal (Build Q3 — high impact)
Anonymous voice reporting. 20-second clip. ARIA processes sentiment, urgency, classification. Distress detection triggers escalation.
Why TrackTik can't: Voice + sentiment + ARIA orchestration = 18 months of architecture work. They have no agentic foundation to plug it into.
Feature 3 — Visitor & Contractor Onboarding (Build Q3 — channel multiplier)
Every visitor signs in (digital pass). Receives a Safety Card with QR + 10-second protection briefing. They are now part of the network.
Why this is the killer: Client now sees Dardan as the firm that protects EVERY person who walks in. Not just the ones in uniform. Renewal pricing power increases.
Feature 4 — Threat Intelligence Subscription (Build Q4 — pure margin)
Quarterly sector reports per industry vertical. Education / Healthcare / Retail / Hospitality / Corporate. Generated by ORACLE from anonymised pooled data.
Sold as £15k/yr add-on. Pure margin. Pure moat. TrackTik doesn't have public-incident data to produce equivalent.
Feature 5 — The Insurer Channel via SHIELD (Q4 — Trojan horse distribution)
Direct integration with Marsh, Aon, Howden, AXA. Sites that deploy Absolute Defence get a verified premium discount.
Why this matters: Insurers become OUR distribution channel. They tell their clients to deploy us to lower premiums. Inverts the sales motion entirely.
Feature 6 — Behavioural Training Layer via FORGE (Q1 next year — retention engine)
Quarterly micro-training to ALL staff on a site, generated from THAT site's actual incident patterns by FORGE.
TrackTik trains guards. We train everybody. Reception, security, retail floor, healthcare ward — all get site-specific defensive training.
🤝 PARTNER CHANNEL COMMERCIAL MODEL (The Dardan Template)
Why partner-led: Partners (Dardan, Securitas, Mitie, G4S, Corps Security, OCS) already have the contracts, the trust, the renewals. We supply the layer they cannot build. They sell. We power.
Three commercial models (offer, let partner choose)
Co-brand — 'Dardan Sentinel, powered by Absolute Defence.' Both logos. Easiest entry. Lowest commitment from partner.
White-label — 'Dardan Sentinel.' We are invisible. Partner pays us per site, sells at their own margin. Highest revenue ceiling per partner.
Referral — Partner introduces us to clients. Standard 20% revenue share for first 24 months. Lowest friction. Use for partners who don't want product ownership.
Single site, standard: £400-£600/month. Includes ADOS platform, Public QR Layer, Acknowledgement Chain, Compliance reports.
Threat Intelligence Subscription add-on: £15k/yr per sector report (Education, Healthcare, etc.)
Implementation: £0 for first pilot site (loss-leader). Standard £2,500 per subsequent site.
The Dardan offer (specific, for the 17 April meeting)
Free 90-day pilot at one Dardan-protected site of Andy's choosing (suggest: an education or campus client where Martyn's Law urgency is highest)
Co-branded as 'Dardan Sentinel.' Joint deployment. Joint case study. Joint press release at end of pilot.
At day 90: Dardan keeps the platform if pilot proves value. Standard partner pricing applies. Dardan gets first refusal on any other education-sector client we engage in next 12 months.
What Andy gets out of it: Walks into Philip Anthony with a signed innovation pilot, joint PR, and a credible new differentiator for renewals. Career win.
Goal: Every external surface speaks the new doctrine. Layer 3. ADOS. Powered by ADOS. Everybody on the premises.
Rewrite homepage hero around 'Public & Personnel Protection Operating System. Powered by ADOS.'
Rebuild Dardan-specific pitch deck around partner positioning ('on top of, not instead of')
Produce 90-second explainer video using locked script. Send to Andy 24 hours before meeting.
Initiate ADOS trademark search (UK + EU + US). Domain capture: ados.security, getados.com, ados.ai if available.
Update LinkedIn (company + Ollie + leadership) with new positioning. 'Powered by ADOS' in bios.
Publish founder essay on LinkedIn / Medium: 'Why TrackTik Will Never Build Layer 3' — establishes thought leadership and category language.
MOVEMENT 2 — REINFORCE (Days 30-90 — Make ADOS visible in product)
Goal: A demo viewer can SEE the nine agents thinking. The organism becomes the centrepiece, not the dashboard.
Ship the SENTINEL Neural Activity Strip on top of the dashboard. Agents light up as they process.
Ship Case Vault Forensic Timeline. Each incident reveals the agent chain with timestamps.
Ship Agent Confidence Badges on incident cards. 'ARIA 94% | COMPASS: RIDDOR applicable | GUARDIAN: response deployed.'
Ship Predictive Risk Overlay on Zone Map. ORACLE's heatmap as a toggleable layer.
Ship ARIA orchestrator-voice. 'Consulting ORACLE for historical patterns…' Visible multi-agent chat.
MOVEMENT 3 — RELEASE (Days 90-180 — New features that widen the moat)
Build Voice Journal (anonymous voice + sentiment via ARIA)
Build Visitor & Contractor Onboarding (digital pass + Safety Card + 10s briefing)
Productise the Public QR Layer (poster pack, Cambridge-style branded templates, install guide)
First Threat Intelligence Subscription report shipped (Education sector — Q4)
Dardan pilot complete. Public case study published. Joint press release.
Sign 2 more white-label partners (target: one mid-tier security firm + one regional)
First insurer integration LOI signed (target: Marsh or Howden via SHIELD)
Listed on Government G-Cloud / Digital Marketplace for public sector access
📊 SUCCESS METRICS (How We Know This Is Working)
30 days: Andy / Dardan signed pilot LOI. New homepage live. ADOS trademark filed.
90 days: 5 frontend ADOS-visibility enhancements shipped. Pilot site live. First incident processed by full agent chain in production.
180 days: Voice Journal + Visitor Onboarding shipped. Dardan paid contract signed. 2 additional white-label partners in active pilot.

365 days: 25+ sites live across partner network. £500k+ ARR. First insurer LOI. Category language ('Layer 3', 'ADOS', 'Public & Personnel Protection') beginning to appear in trade press without our prompting.
Day 1 — Approve this strategy. Lock the doctrine. Notify team.
Day 2 — I produce the Dardan-specific partner pitch deck (rebuild pitch deck around partner angle)
Day 3 — Draft the pre-meeting email to Andy with explainer video attached
Day 4 — Build the one-page leave-behind PDF (CFO-friendly, three outcomes, partnership model)
Day 5 — Build the 7-minute live demo flow tailored to a Dardan-style education or healthcare client
Day 6 — Initiate ADOS trademark search and domain capture
Day 7 — Send the meeting kit to Andy. Confirm 17 April. Pre-frame the conversation with the video.
